scripts.check: node --check src/i18n.js && node --check src/rhythm.js && node --check src/stages.js && node --check src/audio.js && node --check src/ending-bonus.js && node --check src/renderer.js && node --check src/main.js && node --check scripts/ending-bonus-simulation.mjs && node --check scripts/export-switch-stage-results.mjs && node --check scripts/export-switch-ending-bonus.mjs && node --check scripts/check-rhythm-grid.mjs && node --check scripts/check-audio-sync.mjs && node --check scripts/check-runtime-audio-clock.mjs && node --check scripts/check-production-cache.mjs && node --check scripts/check-input-offset-integration.mjs && node scripts/check-data-integrity.mjs && node scripts/rhythm-unit.mjs && node scripts/check-rhythm-grid.mjs && npm run check:timing-machine
